verdict.headline: Safe to transact — sanctions screen is clean and the wallet shows a healthy, active on-chain balance, though no positive labels were confirmed.
verdict.reasoning: The sanctions check returned no matches against the active sanctions corpus, which is the strongest positive signal. The wallet holds ~5.68 ETH, consistent with an active, real user rather than a dormant or throwaway address. Labels came back as unknown (neutral, not negative) and web sentiment was unresolved, so confidence is held to medium rather than high. No risk-indicative terms or contract vulnerabilities were detected, and contract analysis is not applicable since this is an EOA.

findings.finding: No matches against active sanctions lists; risk level reported as low.
No known label or entity type returned — neutral, with no risk-indicative terms (scam, mixer, phisher, etc.).
Wallet holds ~5.68 ETH, indicating an active, funded address consistent with legitimate use.
Web sentiment lookup was unresolved; no adverse press confirmed, but also no corroborating positive coverage.
Not applicable — address is an EOA, not a contract.

services.rationale: All candidates have unknown failure rates; resource 0 ties for the highest inputInfoCompleteness (2/3) and shares the lowest price ($0.001) while having a clearly matching description for wallet sanctions/AML screening.

All candidates have identical unknown failure rates and the same low inputInfoCompleteness (1/3); resource 1 has the clearest label-classification description (exchange, mixer, contract, known entity) and a competitive low price ($0.005).

Resource 1 is the only candidate with inputInfoCompleteness 2/3 alongside a well-matched description (Ethereum balance, token holdings, and transaction history), making it the most reliably documented option at the same price as resource 0.

No candidate in this category truly covers web/social sentiment, but resource 1 is the best available proxy; it is the only entry with inputInfoCompleteness 2/3, which is the strongest differentiator when all failure rates and quality scores are unknown.
